name: plausibleba-ba-skills
description: Just enough business architecture. For every BA, on every project.

plugins.name: ba-plausibleba
plugins.description: Full PlausibleBA session in one command. Capability Map + Concept Model + Value Stream → single bundle. Start here.

plugins.name: ba-capability-mapping
plugins.description: BIZBOK-grounded Business Capability Map. MECE hierarchy, Execution/Governance split, validated XLSX artefact.

plugins.name: ba-concept-model
plugins.description: Business Object Taxonomy using the Capsicum Triad (Party/Record/Resource). Cross-validates Capability Map coverage.

plugins.name: ba-value-streams
plugins.description: Value Stream Analysis. Maps staged delivery of value, orchestrates capabilities, exports ba-skills-bundle.json for VCC.
